title: acer pictum subsp. incurvatum
intro: Acer pictum subsp. incurvatum, also known as the Korean maple, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, thanks to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Acer pictum subsp. incurvatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
